title: K-200 Battery Acceptance Test Procedure
text:
# K-200 Battery Acceptance Test Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-452-F. Revision: F. Type: procedure. Author: Marcus Thaine. Created: 2023-03-18. Last modified: 2023-04-23. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Battery subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1012, P-1121.
